card.removeAllConfirm: Remove {count, plural, one {# copy} other {# copies}} of {name}?

card.unassignFromDeck: Unassign this card from the deck (becomes unowned again)

card.noTokens: This card does not create any token.

footer.copy: © {year} {siteName}. Unofficial project — Magic: The Gathering is a trademark of Wizards of the Coast.

hero.tagline: Your complete Magic: The Gathering companion
hero.description: Search, collect, and manage every Magic card ever printed. Powerful filters, offline sync, and bulk import — all in one place.

instantSearch.title: Instant Search
instantSearch.description: Find any card as you type. Scryfall-powered autocomplete with real-time results across every set ever printed.

advancedFilters.title: Advanced Filters
advancedFilters.description: Filter by color identity, card type, set, mana cost, rarity, and oracle text. Combine filters freely.

collectionManagement.title: Collection Management
collectionManagement.description: Track conditions, foil status, language, purchase price, and more for every card in your collection.

importAnywhere.title: Import from Anywhere
importAnywhere.description: Import your collection from Moxfield or MTG Arena export format. Bulk import hundreds of cards at once.

cloudSync.title: Cloud Sync
cloudSync.description: Sign in to sync your collection across devices. Works offline and syncs automatically when you reconnect.

showcase.heading: Explore Iconic Cards
showcase.subheading: From the Power Nine to modern staples — every card at your fingertips.

cta.title: Ready to Explore?
cta.description: Search through over 80,000 unique Magic: The Gathering cards. Build and manage your collection with ease.

login.title: Sign in
login.emailSentSub: Click the link in the email, or enter the code below.

error.confirmationFailedDescription: This sign-in link is invalid or has already been used.
error.otpExpiredDescription: This sign-in link has expired. Links are valid for 1 hour.
error.accessDeniedDescription: The sign-in was refused. Try again by requesting a new link.
error.defaultDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Try again by requesting a new link.

profile.title: Profile
profile.nicknameCheckFailed: Unable to check the nickname right now.

language.title: Language
language.hint: The default card language stays English for now.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.hint: When your profile is private, your public page as well as your decks, collection and wishlist are no longer visible to other users.

account.title: Account
account.emailChangeRequested: A confirmation email has been sent to your current address.
account.deleteConfirm: This action is irreversible: your account and all your data (collection, decks) will be permanently deleted.

sets.title: Sets
sets.emptyDescription: No result for this search or filter.
sets.partialCollection: Collection partially loaded — completion may be underestimated.

search.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again.
search.adjustSearch: Try adjusting your search or filters.

cgu.title: Terms of Use
cgu.object: {siteName} is a free collection and deck management service for the Magic: The Gathering game. Using the service implies acceptance of these terms.
cgu.account: Creating an account requires an email address (sign-in via one-time code). You are responsible for the content you publish (nickname, description, avatar, custom cards) and warrant that you hold the necessary rights to the files you import.
cgu.ip: Magic: The Gathering as well as card names and images are the property of Wizards of the Coast, LLC. {siteName} is an independent, unofficial project, not affiliated with or endorsed by Wizards of the Coast.
cgu.userContent: The publisher reserves the right to remove any unlawful content or content that breaches these terms. You remain responsible for the content you upload.
cgu.liability: The service is provided "as is", without any warranty of continuous availability or freedom from errors. The publisher cannot be held liable for damages resulting from the use or unavailability of the service.
cgu.contact: For any question: <email></email> or <discord>Discord</discord>. These terms are governed by French law.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy describes how {siteName} processes your personal data, in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
privacy.controller: The data controller is {editorName}. For any request regarding your data: <email></email>.
privacy.dataEmail: Email address (required to create the account and sign in);
privacy.dataProfile: Optional profile information you provide (nickname, description, avatar);
privacy.dataTechnical: Technical data (server connection logs, IP address).
privacy.purposes: Creating and managing your account, authentication, displaying your public profile, running the service (collections and decks) and site security.
privacy.legalBasis: Performance of the service you request (account and profile data management) and our legitimate interest in ensuring site security and keeping technical logs.
privacy.recipients: Your data is hosted by the publisher ({hostLabel}). Sending sign-in emails relies on {mailProvider}, acting as a processor. Your data is neither sold nor shared for commercial purposes. No transfer outside the European Union is carried out.
privacy.retention: Your account data is kept for as long as the account exists; you may delete it at any time. Technical logs are kept for {months} months.
privacy.rights: You have the rights of access, rectification, erasure, portability, restriction and objection regarding your data. To exercise them, contact <email></email>.
privacy.cookies: {siteName} only uses cookies strictly necessary for the service to function (authentication and maintaining your session). These cookies are exempt from consent; no audience-measurement or advertising-tracking cookie is set. No consent banner is therefore required.
privacy.complaint: For any question or complaint regarding your data, we invite you to contact us first, by email at <email></email> or on our <discord>Discord server</discord>: we strive to resolve each request quickly and directly. Should a difficulty persist, you retain the right to lodge a complaint with the French data protection authority (CNIL), <cnil>www.cnil.fr</cnil>.

legalNotice.title: Legal Notice
legalNotice.editorPersonal: The site {siteName} is published by {editorName}. Publication director: {director}. Contact: <email></email> — Discord: <discord>community server</discord>.
legalNotice.hosting: {hostLabel}. The transactional email service (sending sign-in emails) is provided by {mailProvider}.
legalNotice.ip: Magic: The Gathering as well as card names and images are the property of Wizards of the Coast, LLC. {siteName} is an independent, unofficial project that is neither affiliated with, nor endorsed or sponsored by Wizards of the Coast. The other content of the site (code, interface) remains the property of the publisher.
legalNotice.contact: For any question about the site, you can write to <email></email> or join us on <discord>Discord</discord>.
